global_description: Streamlined aquatic mammal with a torpedo-shaped body, covered in smooth, gray or brown fur. It has large, dark eyes, small external ear openings, and whiskers on its rounded face. The limbs are modified into flippers, with the rear flippers extending behind the body for propulsion in water.

part_details.head: Rounded with large dark eyes and whiskers
part_details.body: Streamlined, torpedo-shaped, covered in smooth fur
part_details.flippers: Modified limbs for swimming, rear flippers extend behind
part_details.eyes: Large and dark, adapted for underwater vision

spatial_relations: Flippers attached to sides and rear
Eyes positioned on sides of head
